sections.paragraph:
f. [plur. const. עֶבְרֹות also עַבְרֹות Psa 7:7 ].-

(1) outpouring of anger (compare the root in Hithpa.). Job 40:11, עֶבְרֹות אַפֶּךָ “the outpourings of thy anger.” Hence used of wrath itself as poured out, Isa 14:6 10:6 often used of the anger of God, and of punishment sent by God. יֹום עֶבְרָה the day of divine wrath, Pro 11:4 Zep 1:15, 18 Zep 1:18comp. Pro 11:23.

(2) ὕβρις, pride, haughtiness, Uebermuth (see the root Hithpael No. 2), Isa 16:6 Jerem. 48:30 Psa 7:7.
